case_title: MARA BERTOLUCCI VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) GRACE GLENN, CLAIMS ADJUSTER FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-20-2021 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO OCT-29-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MARA BERTOLUCCI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CCSF, REPRESETNED BY GRACE GLENN, CLAIMS ADJUSTER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT STATES TO THE COURT THAT PARTIES ARE IN THE PROCESS OF SETTLEMENT TALKS. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
TRIAL RESET TO AUG-20-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUN-21-2021 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF MARA BERTOLUCCI IS NOT PRESENT.
